summary: A simple note-taking application allowing users to create, save, and manage notes.

entities.name: User
entities.description: Represents a user of the application.

user_flows.name: Create Note
steps: User opens the note creation page.
User enters the title and content of the note.
User saves the note.
System creates a new note record in the database, associated with the user.
System redirects the user to the note viewing page.

user_flows.name: Save Note
steps: User opens the note editing page.
User modifies the title or content of the note.
User saves the note.
System updates the note record in the database.
System redirects the user to the note viewing page.

user_flows.name: Delete Note
steps: User opens the note viewing page.
User clicks the delete button.
System prompts the user for confirmation.
User confirms the deletion.
System deletes the note record from the database.
System redirects the user to the note list page.

user_flows.name: View Note
steps: User navigates to the note viewing page.
System retrieves the note record from the database.
System displays the note title and content.

user_flows.name: List Notes
user_flows.description: User views a list of their notes.
steps: User navigates to the note list page.
System retrieves all note records associated with the user from the database.
System displays a list of note titles, potentially with excerpts of the content.

user_flows.name: User Registration
steps: User opens the registration page.
User enters username, password, and other required information.
User submits the registration form.
System validates the input.
System creates a new user record in the database.
System logs the user in.

user_flows.name: User Login
steps: User opens the login page.
User enters username and password.
User submits the login form.
System validates the credentials.
System creates a session for the user.
System redirects the user to the note list page.

user_flows.name: User Logout
user_flows.description: User logs out of their account.
steps: User clicks the logout button.
System invalidates the user's session.
System redirects the user to the login page.

pages.name: Note List Page
pages.description: Displays a list of the user's notes.
elements: List of note titles (linked to note viewing page)

pages.name: Note Viewing Page
pages.description: Displays the content of a single note.

pages.name: Note Creation/Editing Page
pages.description: Allows the user to create or edit a note.

pages.name: Registration Page
pages.description: Allows the user to register for a new account.

pages.name: Login Page
pages.description: Allows the user to log into their account.

technical_requirements: Adhere to concept implementation guidelines (no cross-concept imports, action/query method signatures).
Implement user authentication and session management.
Implement data validation and error handling.
Consider using a frontend framework (e.g., React, Vue.js) for the user interface.
